code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of Triple objects into a single fluent sentence.
    Handles a wide range of predicates by mapping them to natural‑language
    phrases. Unrecognised predicates fall back to a generic “X's Y is Z”
    formulation.
    """
    # Mapping from predicate to a function that builds a clause string
    def make_clause(subj: str, pred: str, obj: str) -> str:
        pred = pred.strip()
        # Normalise quotes in objects
        obj = obj.strip('"')
        # Helper for possessive form
        def poss(s):
            return s + "'" if s.endswith('s') else s + "'s"

        mappings = {
            "birthPlace":      lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
            "birthDate":       lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}",
            "birthYear":       lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
            "deathPlace":      lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
            "deathDate":       lambda s, o: f"{s} died on {o}",
            "deathYear":       lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
            "nationality":     lambda s, o: f"{s} is a {o} national",
            "party":           lambda s, o: f"{s} belongs to the {o} party",
            "office":          lambda s, o: f"{s} held the office of {o}",
            "successor":       lambda s, o: f"{s} was succeeded by {o}",
            "predecessor":     lambda s, o: f"{s} succeeded {o}",
            "spouse":          lambda s, o: f"{s} was married to {o}",
            "residence":       lambda s, o: f"{s} resides at {o}",
            "region":          lambda s, o: f"{s} is from the region of {o}",
            "country":         lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {o}",
            "capital":         lambda s, o: f"{s} has capital {o}",
            "largestCity":     lambda s, o: f"The largest city of {s} is {o}",
            "currency":        lambda s, o: f"The currency of {s} is the {o}",
            "language":        lambda s, o: f"{s} speaks {o}",
            "officialLanguage":lambda s, o: f"The official language of {s} is {o}",
            "leader":          lambda s, o: f"The leader of {s} is {o}",
            "governingBody":   lambda s, o: f"The governing body of {s} is {o}",
            "affiliation":     lambda s, o: f"{s} is affiliated with {o}",
            "trainerAircraft": lambda s, o: f"{s} uses {o} as trainer aircraft",
            "ethnicGroup":     lambda s, o: f"{s} has ethnic group {o}",
            "garrison":        lambda s, o: f"{s} is garrisoned at {o}",
            "battle":          lambda s, o: f"{s} fought in the {o}",
            "inOfficeWhilePresident": lambda s, o: f"{s} served while {o} was president",
            "inOfficeWhilePrimeMinister": lambda s, o: f"{s} served while {o} was prime minister",
            "inOfficeWhileVicePresident": lambda s, o: f"{s} served while {o} was vice president",
            "inOfficeWhileGovernor": lambda s, o: f"{s} served while {o} was governor",
            "inOfficeWhileMonarch": lambda s, o: f"{s} served while {o} was monarch",
            "inOfficeWhileMinister": lambda s, o: f"{s} served while {o} held the ministerial post",
            "serviceStartYear":lambda s, o: f"{s} started service in {o}",
            "militaryRank":    lambda s, o: f"{s} held the rank of {o}",
            "unit":            lambda s, o: f"{s} was part of the unit {o}",
            "garrison":        lambda s, o: f"{s} was garrisoned at {o}",
            "award":           lambda s, o: f"{s} received the {o} award",
            "numberOfVotesAttained": lambda s, o: f"{s} attained {o} votes",
            "activeYearsStartDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} started active years on {o}",
            "activeYearsEndDate":   lambda s, o: f"{s} ended active years on {o}",
            "religion":        lambda s, o: f"{s} follows {o}",
            "colour":          lambda s, o: f"The colour associated with {s} is {o}",
            "hasDeputy":       lambda s, o: f"{s} has deputy {o}",
            "successor":       lambda s, o: f"{s} was succeeded by {o}",
            "predecessor":     lambda s, o: f"{s} succeeded {o}",
            "militaryBranch":  lambda s, o: f"{s} served in the {o}",
            "isPartOfMilitaryConflict": lambda s, o: f"The {s} is part of the {o}",
        }
        if pred in mappings:
            return mappings[pred](subj, obj)
        # fallback generic
        return f"{poss(subj)} {pred} is {obj}"

    # Build clauses for each triple
    clauses = [make_clause(t.subject, t.predicate, t.object) for t in triples]

    # Combine clauses into a fluent sentence
    if not clauses:
        return ""
    sentence = ", ".join(clauses)
    # Capitalise first character and add period
    sentence = sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:] + "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
